title: Fiery Gooey Turkish Muffins
description: These spicy muffins are a light and low-carb Turkish dish, featuring a gooey center and a crispy exterior, made with a blend of spices and cheese.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the almond flour, turkish pepper, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, cream cheese, and melted butter until smooth.
Add the crumbled feta cheese and chopped parsley to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the muffins from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
